test.name: TC2 Switch Tab Using NEW and MAIN

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e54129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e513a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4e9db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4e74322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4f26e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4f43482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4ee9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6e4eea183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e543de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e5438588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e5459d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e5156785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e515facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e5143634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e51437e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6e5127e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff80e99257d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff80f52af08+28]

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log Title
kw.doc: Logs and returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
